name: Maryland MHIC Home Improvement Contractor License Search

agency.name: Maryland Department of Labor Maryland Home Improvement Commission

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official MHIC license search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Maryland Home Improvement Commission contractor and salesperson license records exposed by official license search paths
knownExclusions: MHIC is scoped to home improvement work and does not represent every Maryland construction, local permit, trade, or business credential.
Maryland's former home improvement subcontractor license category has been eliminated; preserve this caveat in future normalization.
Complaint, guaranty fund, discipline, and insurance details require separate source review before modeling.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate lookup pages unless access rules and technical controls are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license or registration does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Maryland MHIC home improvement contractor verification. Future work should review license-search result fields and MHIC scope before fixture work.
maintainerNotes: Preserve MHIC scope and subcontractor-category caveats in future verification output.
